var pl = revenue - cost; if (isISIN(p.ticker)) { if (pl >= 0) totalGainFunds += pl; else totalLossFunds += Math.abs(pl); fundSalesList.push("Fecha Compra: ".concat(formatD(p.buyDate), " | Fecha Venta: ").concat(formatD(p.sellDate), " | Fondo: ").concat(p.ticker, " (").concat(p.name, ") | Compra: ").concat(formatMoney(cost, baseCurrency), " | Reembolso: ").concat(formatMoney(revenue, baseCurrency), " | Resultado: ").concat(formatMoney(pl, baseCurrency))); } else { if (pl >= 0) totalGainStocks += pl; else totalLossStocks += Math.abs(pl); stockSalesList.push("Fecha Compra: ".concat(formatD(p.buyDate), " | Fecha Venta: ").concat(formatD(p.sellDate), " | Acci\xf3n: ").concat(p.ticker, " (").concat(p.name, ") | Compra: ").concat(formatMoney(cost, baseCurrency), " | Venta: ").concat(formatMoney(revenue, baseCurrency), " | Resultado: ").concat(formatMoney(pl, baseCurrency))); } }); totalCustodyRenta = 0; portfolio.forEach(function(p) { if (p.custodyFees && Array.isArray(p.custodyFees)) { p.custodyFees.forEach(function(cf) { if (new Date(cf.date).getFullYear() === rentaYear) totalCustodyRenta += parseFloat(cf.amount) || 0; }); } }); pendingComp = 0; compDetails = []; for(i = 1; i <= 4; i++){ y = rentaYear - i; d = resultsData[y]; if (d && d.compRest < 0) { pendingComp += Math.abs(d.compRest); compDetails.push("- A\xf1o ".concat(y, ": Pendiente de compensar ").concat(formatMoney(Math.abs(d.compRest), baseCurrency))); } } prompt = "\n ROL: Eres un Asesor Fiscal Colegiado, experto en el IRPF de Espa\xf1a.\n TAREA: Redactar un manual paso a paso, sumamente detallado, para que el usuario rellene su Declaraci\xf3n de la Renta del Ejercicio Fiscal ".concat(rentaYear, " (campa\xf1a del a\xf1o ").concat(rentaYear + 1, ").\n \n INSTRUCCI\xd3N DE ESTILO Y MAQUETACI\xd3N (\xa1VITAL!):\n La informaci\xf3n debe estar MUY BIEN ESTRUCTURADA. EVITA TOTALMENTE los p\xe1rrafos densos o apelotonados y en NING\xdaN CASO USES SOMBREADOS DONDE LA LETRA NO RESALTE SOBRE ESE COLOR DE FONDO, ANTE LA DUDA USA LETRA NEGRA CON FONDO GRIS CLARO. \n Utiliza listas, negritas, subt\xedtulos cortos y saltos de l\xednea (

      ) abundantes para que la lectura sea ligera, clara y profesional. Todas las cantidades aisladas sombrealas con fondo gris claro y letra negra, azul oscura o roja. Siempre se pondr\xe1 el n\xba de casilla y el importe a poner en ella, indistintamente de que salga en una tabla de las indicadas.\n INSTRUCCI\xd3N DE DATOS: \n Busca en internet la informaci\xf3n m\xe1s actualizada sobre la RENTA DEL EJERCICIO ").concat(rentaYear, " en la Agencia Tributaria Espa\xf1ola, para proporcionar las CASILLAS EXACTAS vigentes y la normativa si es preciso que explique su cometido.\n \n AQU\xcd TIENES LOS DATOS REALES DE LA CARTERA DEL USUARIO:\n\n 1. DESGLOSE DE DIVIDENDOS COBRADOS:\n ").concat(divDetails.length > 0 ? divDetails.join('\n') : 'No hay dividendos cobrados este ejercicio.', "\n --\x3e TOTALES DIVIDENDOS: Bruto: ").concat(formatMoney(divBruto, baseCurrency), " | Ret. Extranjera: ").concat(formatMoney(divRetExt, baseCurrency), " | Ret. Espa\xf1a: ").concat(formatMoney(divRetEsp, baseCurrency), " | Base para Deducci\xf3n Doble Imposici\xf3n (L\xedmite 15% aplicado): ").concat(formatMoney(divDobleImp15, baseCurrency), "\n --\x3e GASTOS ADMINISTRACI\xd3N Y CUSTODIA DEDUCIBLES: ").concat(formatMoney(totalCustodyRenta, baseCurrency), "\n\n 2. DESGLOSE DE VENTA DE ACCIONES:\n ").concat(stockSalesList.length > 0 ? stockSalesList.join('\n') : 'No se realizaron ventas de acciones este ejercicio.', "\n --\x3e TOTALES ACCIONES: Ganancias brutas totales: ").concat(formatMoney(totalGainStocks, baseCurrency), " | P\xe9rdidas brutas totales: ").concat(formatMoney(totalLossStocks, baseCurrency), "\n\n 3. DESGLOSE DE REEMBOLSOS DE FONDOS DE INVERSI\xd3N:\n ").concat(fundSalesList.length > 0 ? fundSalesList.join('\n') : 'No se realizaron reembolsos de fondos de inversión este ejercicio.', "\n --\x3e TOTALES FONDOS: Ganancias brutas totales: ").concat(formatMoney(totalGainFunds, baseCurrency), " | P\xe9rdidas brutas totales: ").concat(formatMoney(totalLossFunds, baseCurrency), "\n\n 4. COMPENSACI\xd3N DE P\xc9RDIDAS DE A\xd1OS ANTERIORES:\n - Saldo total pendiente aplicable este a\xf1o: ").concat(formatMoney(pendingComp, baseCurrency), "\n ").concat(compDetails.length > 0 ? compDetails.join('\n') : '- No hay saldos pendientes de años anteriores.', "\n\n FORMATO DE SALIDA REQUERIDO (Usa c\xf3digo HTML limpio, text-align left para textos y right para n\xfameros):\n\n

      1. INSTRUCCIONES PARA DECLARAR DIVIDENDOS Y GASTOS

      \n

      Indica de forma clara, con p\xe1rrafos cortos, la secci\xf3n del Renta Web y las CASILLAS EXACTAS para el importe bruto (indicar importe), la retenci\xf3n nacional (indicar importe), y la casilla para aplicar la deducci\xf3n por doble imposici\xf3n internacional con el importe de ").concat(formatMoney(divDobleImp15, baseCurrency), ". Indica tambi\xe9n obligatoriamente la CASILLA EXACTA de 'Gastos de administraci\xf3n y dep\xf3sito de valores negociables' donde debe introducir los ").concat(formatMoney(totalCustodyRenta, baseCurrency), ' deducibles.

      \n [AQU\xcd DEBES GENERAR UNA TABLA HTML con el desglose Ticker a Ticker de los dividendos indicados arriba (Columnas: Ticker, Bruto, Ret. Origen, Ret. Destino, Neto). INCLUYE UNA FILA FINAL DE TOTALES AL PIE DE LA TABLA. Usa un estilo corporativo sencillo: ...
      con encabezados y pies con letras negra, roja o azul y fondo gris].\n \n

      2. INSTRUCCIONES PARA DECLARAR VENTA DE ACCIONES

      \n

      Indica la secci\xf3n y las CASILLAS correspondientes en Renta Web. Aconseja brevemente sobre la agrupaci\xf3n de operaciones.

      \n [AQU\xcd DEBES GENERAR OTRA TABLA HTML con las operaciones de venta de acciones desglosadas arriba (Columnas: Fecha compra, Fecha venta, Acci\xf3n, Importe Compra, Importe Venta, Plusval\xeda/P\xe9rdida). INCLUYE UNA FILA FINAL DE TOTALES AL PIE DE LA TABLA separando Ganancias y P\xe9rdidas. Aplica el mismo estilo de tabla que en dividendos].\n\n

      3. INSTRUCCIONES PARA DECLARAR REEMBOLSOS DE FONDOS DE INVERSI\xd3N

      \n

      Indica de forma clara en qu\xe9 apartado y en qu\xe9 CASILLAS EXACTAS del Modelo 100 se declaran las ganancias y p\xe9rdidas patrimoniales derivadas de la transmisi\xf3n o reembolso de acciones o participaciones de Instituciones de Inversi\xf3n Colectiva (Fondos). IMPORTANTE: Indica expl\xedcitamente cu\xe1l es la casilla donde el usuario debe anotar la Retenci\xf3n Practicada (habitualmente del 19%) sobre las plusval\xedas de los fondos.

      \n [AQU\xcd DEBES GENERAR OTRA TABLA HTML con las operaciones de fondos desglosadas arriba (Columnas: Fecha compra, Fecha venta, Fondo, Importe Compra, Importe Reembolso, Plusval\xeda/P\xe9rdida). INCLUYE UNA FILA FINAL DE TOTALES AL PIE DE LA TABLA separando Ganancias y P\xe9rdidas. Si no hubo reembolsos de fondos, simplemente ind\xedcalo amablemente].\n\n

      4. APLICACI\xd3N DE COMPENSACIONES PENDIENTES

      \n

      Explica en p\xe1rrafos MUY CORTOS en qu\xe9 apartado de la Base Imponible del Ahorro debe entrar el usuario para compensar los ').concat(formatMoney(pendingComp, baseCurrency), " de a\xf1os pasados.

      \n\n

      5. RESUMEN FINAL DE CASILLAS E IMPORTES A INTRODUCIR

      \n
        \n [Crea una lista limpia y espaciada con el formato: Casilla XXX: Importe correspondiente y descripci\xf3n corta. \xa1Aseg\xfarate de incluir la casilla de retenciones de fondos si aplica!]\n
      \n "); return [ 4, askAI(apiKey, secondaryApiKey, prompt, aiModel) ]; case 2: res = _state.sent(); cleanHtml = res.trim().replace(/```html/g, '').replace(/```/g, ''); startIdx = cleanHtml.indexOf('<'); if (startIdx !== -1) cleanHtml = cleanHtml.substring(startIdx); setRentaReport(cleanHtml); setIsRentaReportModalOpen(true); return [ 3, 5 ]; case 3: e = _state.sent(); alert("Error al generar el informe fiscal: " + e.message); return [ 3, 5 ]; case 4: setIsGeneratingRenta(false); return [ 7 ]; case 5: return [ 2 ]; } }); })(); }; var handlePrint = function handlePrint() { var printWindow = window.open('', '', 'height=800,width=1200'); var emissionTime = new Date().toLocaleString(); var html = "Resultados Anuales"; html += '

      INFORME DE RESULTADOS ANUALES CARTERA

      EMISI\xd3N: '.concat(emissionTime, "
      "); html += "

      1. Rendimiento y Fiscalidad Base

      "; html += ''; yearsToShow.forEach(function(year) { var d = resultsData[year] || {}; html += '"); }); html += "
      A\xf1oLotesBeneficioP\xe9rdidaRes. SIN DivDividendosRes. CON Div% Imp.ImpuestosNeto/AcumRes. SIN Div (R)Gtos BrokerAjustesBase Imp. 19%
      '.concat(year, '').concat(formatN(d.soldCount, 0), "").concat(formatMoney(d.profitPrice, baseCurrency), '').concat(formatMoney(d.lossPrice, baseCurrency), '').concat(formatMoney(d.resNoDiv, baseCurrency), "").concat(formatMoney(d.dividends, baseCurrency), '').concat(formatMoney(d.resWithDiv, baseCurrency), '').concat(formatN(d.taxRate !== undefined ? d.taxRate : 19), "%").concat(formatMoney(d.tax, baseCurrency), "").concat(formatMoney(d.accumulated, baseCurrency), '').concat(formatMoney(d.rentaResNoDiv, baseCurrency), "").concat(formatMoney(d.rentaFees, baseCurrency), "").concat(formatMoney(d.rentaAdj, baseCurrency), '').concat(formatMoney(d.rentaBase, baseCurrency), "
      "; html += "

      2. Cuadro de Seguimiento de Compensaci\xf3n de P\xe9rdidas (4 A\xf1os)

      "; html += ''; yearsToShow.forEach(function(year) { var d = resultsData[year] || {}; if (d.rentaBase < 0 || d.compRest !== 0 || d.comp1 !== 0) { html += '"); } }); html += "
      A\xf1o OrigenBase Imponible (G/P)Compensado 1er A\xf1oCompensado 2do A\xf1oCompensado 3er A\xf1oCompensado 4to A\xf1oPENDIENTE COMPENSAR
      '.concat(year, '').concat(formatMoney(d.rentaBase, baseCurrency), "").concat(formatMoney(d.comp1, baseCurrency), "").concat(formatMoney(d.comp2, baseCurrency), "").concat(formatMoney(d.comp3, baseCurrency), "").concat(formatMoney(d.comp4, baseCurrency), '').concat(formatMoney(d.compRest, baseCurrency), "
      "; html += '
      NORMATIVA COMPENSACI\xd3N (Base del Ahorro IRPF): Si el saldo de Ganancias y P\xe9rdidas Patrimoniales (ventas) es negativo, se compensa en los 4 a\xf1os siguientes en este orden:
      1. Contra el saldo positivo de Ganancias Patrimoniales (otras ventas) de esos a\xf1os (Sin l\xedmite).
      2. Si a\xfan queda p\xe9rdida, contra el saldo positivo de Rendimientos de Capital Mobiliario (dividendos/intereses) de esos a\xf1os (Con l\xedmite del 25% de dicho saldo).
      (*) Verificar anualmente Casillas de "Pendiente de compensaci\xf3n ejercicios anteriores" en la secci\xf3n Base Imponible del Ahorro del Modelo 100.
      '; html += ""; printWindow.document.write(html); printWindow.document.close(); printWindow.focus(); setTimeout(function() { return printWindow.print(); }, 500); }; var handlePrintRentaReport = function handlePrintRentaReport() { var printWindow = window.open('', '', 'height=800,width=800'); var html = "Borrador Renta iA - Ejercicio ".concat(rentaYear, "\n

      GU\xcdA FISCAL iA - IRPF EJERCICIO ").concat(rentaYear, '

      \n
      \n EMISI\xd3N: ').concat(new Date().toLocaleString(), "
      \n AVISO LEGAL: Este documento es una gu\xeda automatizada generada por Inteligencia Artificial basada en los datos introducidos en la plataforma. No sustituye el consejo de un asesor fiscal cualificado. Es responsabilidad del contribuyente verificar la exactitud de las casillas en el manual oficial de la Agencia Tributaria para la campa\xf1a correspondiente.\n
      \n
      ").concat(rentaReport, "

\n UrlFetchApp.fetch("https://www.google.com");\n console.log("✅ Permisos concedidos.");\n}\n\nfunction doPost(e) {\n var lock = LockService.getScriptLock(); \n lock.tryLock(10000);\n try {\n var data = JSON.parse(e.postData.contents);\n var fileName = "BOARDINGGATE_DB.json";\n var backupName = "BOARDINGGATE_DB.json.bak";\n var files = DriveApp.getFilesByName(fileName);\n if (files.hasNext()) {\n var file = files.next();\n var backupFiles = DriveApp.getFilesByName(backupName);\n var backupFile = backupFiles.hasNext() ? backupFiles.next() : DriveApp.createFile(backupName, "", MimeType.PLAIN_TEXT);\n backupFile.setContent(file.getBlob().getDataAsString());\n file.setContent(JSON.stringify(data));\n } else {\n DriveApp.createFile(fileName, JSON.stringify(data), MimeType.PLAIN_TEXT);\n }\n return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ status: "success", timestamp: data.timestamp })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);\n } catch(err) { \n return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({status: "error", error: err.toString()})).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON); \n } finally { lock.releaseLock(); }\n}\n\nfunction doGet(e) {\n if (e.parameter.anchor === "true" && e.parameter.ticker) {\n return fetchTradingViewAnchorData(e.parameter.ticker);\n }\n\n if (e.parameter.intrinsic === "true" && e.parameter.ticker) {\n return fetchFundamentalData(e.parameter.ticker);\n }\n\n if (e.parameter.screener === "true") {\n return executeTradingViewScreener(e.parameter);\n }\n if (e.parameter.tickers) { return fetchStockData(e.parameter.tickers); }\n try {\n var fileName = e.parameter.restoreBak === "true" ? "BOARDINGGATE_DB.json.bak" : "BOARDINGGATE_DB.json";\n var files = DriveApp.getFilesByName(fileName);\n if (files.hasNext()) { return ContentService.createTextOutput(files.next().getBlob().getDataAsString()).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON); }\n return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({timestamp:0})).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);\n } catch(err) { return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({error:err.toString()})).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON); }\n}\n\nfunction fetchTradingViewAnchorData(rawTicker) {\n var cleanSym = rawTicker.toUpperCase().trim();\n if (cleanSym.includes(":")) {\n cleanSym = cleanSym.split(":")[1];\n } else if (cleanSym.includes(".")) {\n cleanSym = cleanSym.split(".")[0];\n }\n \n var payload = {\n "filter": [\n { "left": "name", "operation": "equal", "right": cleanSym }\n ],\n "options": { "lang": "es" },\n "markets": ["america", "spain", "uk", "germany", "france", "japan", "hongkong", "canada", "australia", "italy", "switzerland", "netherlands"],\n "columns": [\n "name", // d[0]\n "description", // d[1]\n "close", // d[2]\n "price_52_week_high", // d[3]\n "price_earnings_ttm", // d[4]\n "eps_ttm", // d[5]\n "dividend_yield_recent", // d[6]\n "beta_1_year", // d[7]\n "fifty_two_week_low", // d[8]\n "market_cap_basic" // d[9]\n ]\n };\n\n var options = {\n "method": "post",\n "contentType": "application/json",\n "headers": { "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0" },\n "payload": JSON.stringify(payload),\n "muteHttpExceptions": true\n };\n\n var res = { success: false, ticker: rawTicker };\n try {\n var response = UrlFetchApp.fetch("https://scanner.tradingview.com/global/scan", options);\n if (response.getResponseCode() === 200) {\n var json = JSON.parse(response.getContentText());\n if (json.data && json.data.length > 0) {\n var d = json.data[0].d;\n \n var rawMc = d[9] || 0;\n var formattedMc = "N/D";\n if (rawMc >= 1e12) formattedMc = (rawMc / 1e12).toFixed(2) + " T";\n else if (rawMc >= 1e9) formattedMc = (rawMc / 1e9).toFixed(2) + " B";\n else if (rawMc >= 1e6) formattedMc = (rawMc / 1e6).toFixed(2) + " M";\n\n res = {\n success: true,\n ticker: rawTicker,\n p: d[2] ? d[2].toFixed(2) : "N/D",\n mc: formattedMc,\n pe: d[4] ? d[4].toFixed(2) : "N/D",\n eps: d[5] ? d[5].toFixed(2) : "N/D",\n div: d[6] ? d[6].toFixed(2) : "0.00",\n beta: d[7] ? d[7].toFixed(2) : "1.00",\n h52: d[8] && d[3] ? (d[8].toFixed(2) + " - " + d[3].toFixed(2)) : "N/D"\n };\n }\n }\n } catch (err) {\n res.error = err.toString();\n }\n return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify(res)).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);\n}\n\nfunction executeTradingViewScreener(params) {\n var regionMap = {\n \'USA\': \'america\', \'SPAIN\': \'spain\', \'UK\': \'uk\', \'GERMANY\': \'germany\',\n \'FRANCE\': \'france\', \'JAPAN\': \'japan\', \'CHINA_HK\': \'hongkong\', \'CANADA\': \'canada\',\n \'AUSTRALIA\': \'australia\', \'ITALY\': \'italy\', \'SWITZERLAND\': \'switzerland\', \'NETHERLANDS\': \'netherlands\'\n };\n \n var market = regionMap[params.region] || \'america\';\n var limit = parseInt(params.limit) || 20;\n \n var payload = {\n "filter": [\n { "left": "type", "operation": "in_range", "right": ["stock", "dr"] }\n ],\n "options": { "lang": "es" },\n "markets": [market],\n "columns": [\n "name", // d[0]\n "description", // d[1]\n "close", // d[2]\n "price_52_week_high", // d[3]\n "price_earnings_ttm", // d[4]\n "price_earnings_growth_ttm", // d[5] (PEG)\n "return_on_equity_fq", // d[6] (ROI)\n "dividend_yield_recent", // d[7] (Yield)\n "price_book_ratio", // d[8] (P/B)\n "debt_to_equity_fq", // d[9] (D/E)\n "free_cash_flow_margin_ttm", // d[10] (FCF%)\n "earnings_per_share_diluted_yoy_growth_ttm" // d[11] (Crec. EPS YoY)\n ],\n "sort": { "sortBy": "market_cap_basic", "sortOrder": "desc" },\n "range": [0, 800] \n };\n\n var options = {\n "method": "post",\n "contentType": "application/json",\n "headers": {\n "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/121.0.0.0 Safari/537.36"\n },\n "payload": JSON.stringify(payload),\n "muteHttpExceptions": true\n };\n\n try {\n var url = "https://scanner.tradingview.com/global/scan";\n var res = UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, options);\n var json = JSON.parse(res.getContentText());\n if (!json.data) return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({error: "No hay datos."})).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);\n\n var results = [];\n for (var i = 0; i < json.data.length; i++) {\n var d = json.data[i].d;\n \n var row = {\n ticker: d[0], name: d[1], price: d[2], high52: d[3],\n per: d[4], peg: d[5], roi: d[6], divYield: d[7],\n pb: d[8], de: d[9], fcf: d[10], epsGrowth: d[11]\n };\n\n if (params.per && (row.per === null || row.per <= 0 || row.per > parseFloat(params.per))) continue;\n if (params.divYield && (row.divYield === null || row.divYield < parseFloat(params.divYield))) continue;\n if (params.roi && (row.roi === null || row.roi < parseFloat(params.roi))) continue;\n if (params.peg && (row.peg === null || row.peg > parseFloat(params.peg))) continue;\n if (params.pb && (row.pb === null || row.pb > parseFloat(params.pb))) continue;\n if (params.debtEquity && (row.de === null || row.de > parseFloat(params.debtEquity) * 100)) continue;\n if (params.epsGrowth && (row.epsGrowth === null || row.epsGrowth < parseFloat(params.epsGrowth))) continue;\n\n var trendStr = "-";\n var dropFromHigh = row.high52 > 0 ? (row.price - row.high52) / row.high52 : 0; \n if (params.trend === \'ath\') {\n if (dropFromHigh < -0.05) continue; \n trendStr = "M\xe1ximos (ATH)";\n } else if (params.trend === \'drop\') {\n var limitDrop = - (parseFloat(params.dropPct) || 20) / 100;\n if (dropFromHigh > limitDrop) continue; \n trendStr = "Desplome";\n }\n\n results.push({\n ticker: row.ticker, name: row.name, price: parseFloat(row.price.toFixed(2)), trendStatus: trendStr,\n per: row.per ? parseFloat(row.per.toFixed(2)) : "N/A",\n peg: row.peg ? parseFloat(row.peg.toFixed(2)) : "N/A",\n roi: row.roi ? parseFloat(row.roi.toFixed(2)) : "N/A",\n divYield: row.divYield ? parseFloat(row.divYield.toFixed(2)) : "N/A",\n pb: row.pb ? parseFloat(row.pb.toFixed(2)) : "N/A",\n debtEquity: row.de ? parseFloat((row.de/100).toFixed(2)) : "N/A",\n fcf: row.fcf ? parseFloat(row.fcf.toFixed(2)) : "N/A",\n epsGrowth: row.epsGrowth ? parseFloat(row.epsGrowth.toFixed(2)) : "N/A"\n });\n if (results.length >= limit) break;\n }\n return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify(results)).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);\n } catch(err) {\n return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({error: err.toString()})).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);\n }\n}\n\nfunction fetchStockData(tickersString) {\n var tickerList = tickersString.split(",");\n var requests = [];\n var validTickers = [];\n var yahooSymbols = [];\n\n for (var i = 0; i < tickerList.length; i++) {\n var rawTicker = tickerList[i].trim();\n if (!rawTicker) continue;\n var yahooTicker = convertToYahoo(rawTicker);\n var url = "https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/" + \n encodeURIComponent(yahooTicker) + \n "?interval=1d&range=5d&includePrePost=true";\n requests.push({\n url: url,\n method: "GET",\n muteHttpExceptions: true,\n headers: {\n "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36",\n "Accept": "application/json"\n }\n });\n validTickers.push(rawTicker);\n yahooSymbols.push(yahooTicker);\n }\n\n var results = {};\n var responses = UrlFetchApp.fetchAll(requests);\n\n for (var j = 0; j < responses.length; j++) {\n var rawTicker = validTickers[j];\n var res = { success: false };\n var code = responses[j].getResponseCode();\n if (code === 200) {\n try {\n var json = JSON.parse(responses[j].getContentText());\n var resultObj = json.chart.result[0];\n var meta = resultObj.meta; \n \n var p = meta.preMarketPrice || meta.regularMarketPrice || meta.postMarketPrice || 0;\n var pc = meta.regularMarketPreviousClose || meta.previousClose || meta.chartPreviousClose || 0;\n \n try {\n var quote = resultObj.indicators.quote[0];\n if (quote && quote.close && quote.close.length > 0) {\n var closes = quote.close.filter(function(v) { \n return v !== null && v !== undefined && typeof v === \'number\' && v > 0; \n });\n \n if (closes.length >= 2) {\n p = closes[closes.length - 1]; // \xdaltimo precio real registrado\n pc = closes[closes.length - 2]; // Cierre de la sesi\xf3n de bolsa inmediatamente anterior\n } else if (closes.length === 1) {\n p = closes[0];\n }\n }\n } catch (errQuote) {\n Logger.log("Incapaz de extraer serie temporal para " + rawTicker + ": " + errQuote.toString());\n }\n\n if (p > 0) {\n res.p = p;\n res.pc = pc;\n res.success = true;\n } else {\n res.error = "Precio 0 en respuesta.";\n }\n } catch(err) {\n res.error = "Error JSON: " + err.toString();\n }\n } else {\n res.error = "HTTP " + code;\n Logger.log("❌ " + rawTicker + " (" + yahooSymbols[j] + ") → HTTP " + code);\n }\n results[rawTicker] = res;\n }\n return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify(results)).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);\n}\n\nfunction convertToYahoo(rawTicker) {\n if (!rawTicker || typeof rawTicker !== \'string\') {\n return "";\n }\n \n var indexMap = {\n "INDEXSP:.INX": "^GSPC",\n "INDEXDJX:.DJI": "^DJI", \n "INDEXNASDAQ:.IXIC":"^IXIC",\n "INDEXRUSSELL:RUT": "^RUT",\n "INDEXCBOE:VIX": "^VIX",\n "INDEXFTSE:UKX": "^FTSE",\n "INDEXEURO:SX5E": "^STOXX50E",\n "BME:IBEX": "^IBEX",\n "INDEXBVB:BET": "^BET"\n };\n\n if (indexMap[rawTicker]) return indexMap[rawTicker];\n\n if (rawTicker.includes(":")) {\n var parts = rawTicker.split(":");\n var exchange = parts[0].toUpperCase();\n var sym = parts[1].toUpperCase();\n var exchangeMap = {\n "BME": ".MC", "EPA": ".PA", "ETR": ".DE", "LON": ".L",\n "BIT": ".MI", "AMS": ".AS", "SWX": ".SW", "TSE": ".TO",\n "ASX": ".AX", "HKG": ".HK", "TYO": ".T",\n "NYSE": "", "NASDAQ": "", "INDEXSP": "", "INDEXDJX": "", "INDEXNASDAQ": ""\n };\n return sym + (exchangeMap[exchange] !== undefined ? exchangeMap[exchange] : "." + exchange);\n }\n\n if (rawTicker.length === 6 && !rawTicker.includes(".") && !rawTicker.includes("-")) {\n return rawTicker + "=X";\n }\n\n return rawTicker;\n}\n\nfunction testFetch() {\n var result = fetchStockData("BME:SAN,AAPL,USDEUR,INDEXSP:.INX,INDEXDJX:.DJI,INDEXNASDAQ:.IXIC");\n Logger.log(JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(result.getContent()), null, 2));\n}\n\nfunction fetchFundamentalData(rawTicker) {\n if (!rawTicker) {\n return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({\n success: false, \n error: "Error: No se ha proporcionado un ticker v\xe1lido para la consulta."\n })).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);\n }\n\n var yahooTicker = convertToYahoo(rawTicker);\n var baseUrl = "https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v10/finance/quoteSummary/" + \n encodeURIComponent(yahooTicker) + \n "?modules=financialData,defaultKeyStatistics,cashflowStatementHistory,earningsTrend";\n \n var result = {\n success: false,\n ticker: rawTicker,\n freeCashFlow: 0,\n totalCash: 0,\n totalDebt: 0,\n sharesOutstanding: 1,\n beta: 1.0,\n growthRate: 7.5, \n growthSource: "Estimaci\xf3n conservadora (Por defecto)",\n error: ""\n };\n \n try {\n var response = fetchWithYahooAuth(baseUrl);\n var responseCode = response.getResponseCode();\n \n if (responseCode === 200) {\n var json = JSON.parse(response.getContentText());\n if (json.quoteSummary && json.quoteSummary.result && json.quoteSummary.result.length > 0) {\n var summary = json.quoteSummary.result[0];\n \n var financialData = summary.financialData || {};\n var keyStats = summary.defaultKeyStatistics || {};\n var cashflowHistory = summary.cashflowStatementHistory?.cashflowStatements || [];\n var earningsTrend = summary.earningsTrend || {};\n \n if (financialData.freeCashflow && financialData.freeCashflow.raw !== undefined) {\n result.freeCashFlow = financialData.freeCashflow.raw;\n } else if (cashflowHistory.length > 0) {\n result.freeCashFlow = getFCFFromStatement(cashflowHistory[0]);\n }\n \n result.totalCash = financialData.totalCash?.raw || 0;\n result.totalDebt = financialData.totalDebt?.raw || 0;\n \n // 3. Acciones en circulaci\xf3n\n result.sharesOutstanding = keyStats.sharesOutstanding?.raw || 1;\n \n result.beta = keyStats.beta?.raw || 1.0;\n \n var projectedGrowth = null;\n \n var trends = earningsTrend.trend || [];\n for (var i = 0; i < trends.length; i++) {\n if (trends[i].period === "+5y" && trends[i].growth && trends[i].growth.raw !== undefined) {\n projectedGrowth = trends[i].growth.raw * 100;\n result.growthSource = "Consenso de Analistas (Previsi\xf3n 5 a\xf1os Wall Street)";\n break;\n }\n }\n \n if ((projectedGrowth === null || isNaN(projectedGrowth)) && cashflowHistory.length >= 3) {\n try {\n var fcfLatest = getFCFFromStatement(cashflowHistory[0]);\n var fcfOldest = getFCFFromStatement(cashflowHistory[cashflowHistory.length - 1]);\n \n if (fcfLatest > 0 && fcfOldest > 0) {\n var nYears = cashflowHistory.length - 1;\n var cagr = (Math.pow(fcfLatest / fcfOldest, 1 / nYears) - 1) * 100;\n \n if (!isNaN(cagr) && cagr > 0 && cagr < 55) {\n projectedGrowth = cagr;\n result.growthSource = "C\xe1lculo Matem\xe1tico (CAGR hist\xf3rico del FCF a 3 a\xf1os)";\n }\n }\n } catch(e) {\n }\n }\n \n if (projectedGrowth !== null && !isNaN(projectedGrowth)) {\n result.growthRate = Number(projectedGrowth.toFixed(2));\n }\n \n result.success = true;\n } else {\n result.error = "Error al estructurar los datos fundamentales.";\n }\n } else {\n result.error = "Fallo de conexi\xf3n autorizada. HTTP " + responseCode;\n }\n } catch (e) {\n result.error = e.toString();\n }\n \n return ContentService.createTextOutput(JSON.stringify(result)).setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);\n}\n\nfunction getFCFFromStatement(statement) {\n var ocf = statement.totalCashFromOperatingActivities?.raw || 0;\n var capex = statement.capitalExpenditures?.raw || 0;\n return ocf + capex; // CapEx suele venir en formato negativo\n}\n\nfunction fetchWithYahooAuth(targetUrl) {\n var userAgent = "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36";\n \n try {\n var consentResponse = UrlFetchApp.fetch("https://fc.yahoo.com", {\n "followRedirects": false,\n "muteHttpExceptions": true,\n "headers": { "User-Agent": userAgent }\n });\n \n var headers = consentResponse.getHeaders();\n var setCookie = headers["Set-Cookie"] || headers["set-cookie"];\n \n if (!setCookie) {\n return UrlFetchApp.fetch(targetUrl, { "muteHttpExceptions": true, "headers": { "User-Agent": userAgent } });\n }\n \n var cookie = Array.isArray(setCookie) ? setCookie.join("; ") : setCookie;\n \n var crumbResponse = UrlFetchApp.fetch("https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v1/test/getcrumb", {\n "method": "GET",\n "headers": {\n "Cookie": cookie,\n "User-Agent": userAgent\n },\n "muteHttpExceptions": true\n });\n \n var crumb = crumbResponse.getContentText().trim();\n \n if (!crumb || crumb.includes("Error") || crumbResponse.getResponseCode() !== 200) {\n return UrlFetchApp.fetch(targetUrl, { "muteHttpExceptions": true, "headers": { "User-Agent": userAgent } });\n }\n \n var finalUrl = targetUrl + "&crumb=" + encodeURIComponent(crumb);\n \n return UrlFetchApp.fetch(finalUrl, {\n "method": "GET",\n "headers": {\n "Cookie": cookie,\n "User-Agent": userAgent\n },\n "muteHttpExceptions": true\n });\n \n } catch (e) {\n return UrlFetchApp.fetch(targetUrl, { \n "muteHttpExceptions": true, \n "headers": { "User-Agent": userAgent } \n });\n }\n}\n')), React.createElement("li", { className: "bg-blue-900/80 p-2 rounded border border-blue-500/30 text-blue-200" }, React.createElement("strong", null, "PASO CR\xcdTICO (Autorizaci\xf3n):"), React.createElement("ul", { className: "list-disc list-inside mt-1 space-y-1" }, React.createElement("li", null, "En la barra superior del editor, cambia la funci\xf3n ", React.createElement("code", null, "doPost"), " por ", React.createElement("strong", null, React.createElement("code", null, "A_AUTORIZAR_AQUI")), "."), React.createElement("li", null, "Pulsa el bot\xf3n ", React.createElement("strong", null, "▶ Ejecutar"), "."), React.createElement("li", null, 'Saldr\xe1 una ventana: "Se requiere autorizaci\xf3n" → ', React.createElement("strong", null, "Revisar permisos"), "."), React.createElement("li", null, 'Elige tu cuenta Google. JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(p.lots)) : [ { id: Date.now(), date: p.buyDate, shares: p.shares, price: p.buyPrice, fx: p.buyFx, fees: p.fees, adj: p.adjustments, pe: p.buyPE } ]; lots.sort(function(a, b) { return new Date(a.date) - new Date(b.date); }); var remainingToSell = qtyToSell; var ext = { shares: 0, costBase: 0, costFx: 0, fees: 0, adj: 0, weightedTime: 0, desc: [], consumedLots: [] }; var newLots = []; lots.forEach(function(lot) { var lS = parseFloat(lot.shares) || 0; var lP = parseFloat(lot.price) || 0; var lF = parseFloat(lot.fx) || 1; if (remainingToSell <= 0) { newLots.push(lot); return; } var take = Math.min(lS, remainingToSell); var ratio = take / lS; ext.shares += take; ext.costBase += take * lP; ext.costFx += take * lP * lF; ext.fees = r2(ext.fees + lot.fees * ratio); ext.adj = r2(ext.adj + lot.adj * ratio); ext.weightedTime += new Date(lot.date).getTime() * take; ext.desc.push("• ".concat(formatN(take), " acc. del ").concat(fDateEU(lot.date), " [P: ").concat(formatN(lP, 3), " | FX: ").concat(formatN(lF, 4), " | Gtos: ").concat(formatN(r2(lot.fees * ratio) + r2(lot.adj * ratio)), "]")); }; var MONTHS = [ "ENERO", "FEBRERO", "MARZO", "ABRIL", "MAYO", "JUNIO", "JULIO", "AGOSTO", "SEPTIEMBRE", "OCTUBRE", "NOVIEMBRE", "DICIEMBRE" ]; var MONTHS_SHORT = [ "ENE", "FEB", "MAR", "ABR", "MAY", "JUN", "JUL", "AGO", "SEP", "OCT", "NOV", "DIC" ]; var flatEvents = useMemo(function() { var events = []; portfolio.filter(function(p) { return p.isActive !== false && (p.ticker.toUpperCase().includes(searchQuery.toUpperCase()) || p.name.toUpperCase().includes(searchQuery.toUpperCase())); }).forEach(function(p) { var isS = !!p.sellDate; var curP = isS ? p.sellPrice : p.isIndex ? p.currentPrice / (p.indexDivisor || 1) : p.currentPrice; var curF = isS ? p.sellFx : p.isIndex ? p.buyFx : p.currentFx; if (isS || showActive) { if (p.lots && p.lots.length > 0) { p.lots.forEach(function(l) { var lCost = l.shares * l.price * l.fx + (p.feesIncludedInPrice ? 0 : parseFloat(l.fees) || 0) + (parseFloat(l.adj) || 0); var lProfit = 0; if (!isS) { var lVal = l.shares * curP * curF - (p.feesIncludedInPrice ? 0 : parseFloat(p.fees) || 0) - parseFloat(p.adjustments || 0); lProfit = lVal - lCost; } events.push({ id: "BUY-".concat(l.id || Math.random()), type: 'BUY', date: l.date || p.buyDate, itemObj: p, amount: lCost, profit: lProfit, extra: { name: p.name, shares: l.shares, price: l.price, fees: (parseFloat(l.fees) || 0) + (parseFloat(l.adj) || 0), date: l.date || p.buyDate, isS: isS, cost: lCost, val: !isS ? l.shares * curP * curF : 0, sellDate: p.sellDate, isLot: true } }); }); } else if (p.buyDate) { var cost = p.shares * p.buyPrice * p.buyFx + (p.feesIncludedInPrice ? 0 : p.fees || 0) + (p.adjustments || 0); var profit = 0; if (!isS) { var val = p.shares * curP * curF - (p.sellFeesIncludedInPrice ? 0 : p.sellFees || 0) - (p.sellAdjustments || 0); profit = val - cost; } events.push({ id: "BUY-".concat(p.id), type: 'BUY', date: p.buyDate, itemObj: p, amount: cost, profit: profit, extra: { name: p.name, shares: p.shares, price: p.buyPrice, fees: (p.fees || 0) + (p.adjustments || 0), date: p.buyDate, isS: isS, cost: cost, val: !isS ? p.shares * curP * curF : 0, sellDate: p.sellDate } }); } } if (isS) { var sFees = (p.sellFeesIncludedInPrice ? 0 : p.sellFees || 0) + (p.sellAdjustments || 0); var sRevenue = p.shares * p.sellPrice * p.sellFx - sFees; var costBase = p.shares * p.buyPrice * p.buyFx + (p.feesIncludedInPrice ? 0 : p.fees || 0) + (p.adjustments || 0); events.push({ id: "SELL-".concat(p.id), type: 'SELL', date: p.sellDate, itemObj: p, amount: sRevenue, profit: sRevenue - costBase, extra: { name: p.name, shares: p.shares, buyPrice: p.buyPrice, buyFx: p.buyFx, buyTotalCost: costBase, buyFees: (p.fees || 0) + (p.adjustments || 0), buyDate: p.buyDate, sellPrice: p.sellPrice, sellFx: p.sellFx, sellFees: sFees, sellDate: p.sellDate } }); } if (showDividends && p.dividends) { p.dividends.forEach(function(d) { if (d.year && d.month !== undefined) { var o = parseFloat(d.taxOrigin) || 0; var dest = parseFloat(d.taxDest) || 0; var net = parseFloat(d.net) || 0; if (net !== 0 || o !== 0 || dest !== 0) { var divDate = "".concat(d.year, "-").concat((d.month + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0'), "-15"); events.push({ id: "DIV-".concat(d.id || Math.random()), type: 'DIV', date: divDate, itemObj: p, amount: net, profit: net, extra: { name: p.name, gross: net + o + dest, origin: o, dest: dest, net: net } }); var month = (d.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0'); var yId = "Y-".concat(year); var mId = "M-".concat(year, "-").concat(month); if (!tree.children[yId]) tree.children[yId] = { id: yId, type: 'year', label: year, buys: 0, sells: 0, divs: 0, profit: 0, children: {} }; if (!tree.children[yId].children[mId]) tree.children[yId].children[mId] = { id: mId, type: 'month', label: "".concat(MONTHS_SHORT[d.getMonth()], " ").concat(year), buys: 0, sells: 0, divs: 0, profit: 0, children: [] }; var yNode = tree.children[yId]; var mNode = yNode.children[mId]; if (evt.type === 'BUY') { tree.buys += evt.amount; yNode.buys += evt.amount; mNode.buys += evt.amount; tree.profit += evt.profit; yNode.profit += evt.profit; mNode.profit += evt.profit; } if (evt.type === 'SELL') { tree.sells += evt.amount; yNode.sells += evt.amount; mNode.sells += evt.amount; tree.profit += evt.profit; yNode.profit += evt.profit; mNode.profit += evt.profit; } if (evt.type === 'DIV') { tree.divs += evt.amount; yNode.divs += evt.amount; mNode.divs += evt.amount; tree.profit += evt.amount; yNode.profit += evt.amount; mNode.profit += evt.amount; } mNode.children.push({ id: evt.id, type: evt.type, itemObj: evt.itemObj, date: evt.date, ticker: evt.itemObj.ticker, amount: evt.amount, profit: evt.profit, extra: evt.extra, monthName: MONTHS[d.getMonth()], yearName: year }); var discountedTerminalValue = terminalValue / Math.pow(1 + discountRate / 100, years); var enterpriseValue = presentValueSum + discountedTerminalValue; var equityValue = enterpriseValue + cash - debt;         \n 2. FUENTES REALES: Para cada noticia DEBES incluir OBLIGATORIAMENTE el enlace (URL) a la fuente original usando la etiqueta HTML Leer fuente. NUNCA inventes URLs.\n 3. Devuelve la respuesta \xdaNICAMENTE en formato HTML limpio (usando

Datos iniciales del lote en cartera: fecha compra, n\xba acciones, importe unitario, coste total compra.\n 1. \xbfPaga dividendo actualmente? (Si no, ind\xedcalo claramente y finaliza).\n 2. Indica tambi\xe9n el % que representa el pago de dividendo tanto al precio de cotizaci\xf3n actual como a la del precio de compra.\n 5. VALOR INTR\xcdNSECO Y ENTRADA: Busca el "Fair Value" real en internet. Calcula tu "precio ideal" aplicando un descuento del ').concat(strategyInputs.marginOfSafety, '% sobre ese valor intr\xednseco (si no hay datos de DCF, apl\xedcalo sobre el precio actual de mercado). \n 2. REGLA DE SENTIDO COM\xdaN: El "precio ideal" resultante NUNCA puede ser superior al Precio Actual de Mercado (').concat(currentP, '). Si el c\xe1lculo da superior, toma directamente el Precio Actual de Mercado como tu nuevo "precio ideal".\n 3. AJUSTE T\xc9CNICO: Ajusta tu "precio ideal" al SOPORTE HIST\xd3RICO REAL INMEDIATO INFERIOR m\xe1s cercano que hayas encontrado en internet. Esa ser\xe1 obligatoriamente tu "entryZone". NUNCA sugieras una "entryZone" superior al precio de cotizaci\xf3n actual.\n 4. STOP LOSS: Coloca el Stop Loss 1 por debajo de ese soporte t\xe9cnico cr\xedtico.\n 5. TAMA\xd1O DE POSICI\xd3N (F\xd3RMULA SAGRADA): Calcula "optimalShares" garantizando que: (entryZone - stopLoss1.price) * optimalShares <= ').concat(riskMoney, '. NUNCA superes el riesgo monetario permitido. Si el n\xfamero de acciones da decimales, redond\xe9alo hacia ABAJO al n\xfamero entero m\xe1s cercano.\n 6. OBJETIVOS (TAKE PROFIT): Sit\xfaalos estrictamente en las RESISTENCIAS REALES que hayas recabado en tu b\xfasqueda web.\n \n RESPONDE \xdaNICA Y EXCLUSIVAMENTE CON UN JSON V\xc1LIDO (SIN TEXTO EXTRA, SIN MARKDOWN):\n {\n "entryZone": 150.50,\n "stopLoss1": {"price": 145.0, "pct": -3.6, "lossMoney": 55},\n "stopLoss2": {"price": 140.0, "pct": -6.9, "lossMoney": 105},\n "target1": {"price": 160.0, "pct": 6.3},\n "target2": {"price": 170.0, "pct": 12.9},\n "target3": {"price": 185.0, "pct": 22.9},\n "optimalShares": 6,\n "successProb": "65%",\n "technicalContext": "Escribe aqu\xed: 1) El Valor Intr\xednseco hallado online, 2) C\xf3mo has aplicado el margen del ').concat(strategyInputs.marginOfSafety, '%, y 3) Los soportes y resistencias REALES en los que te has apoyado.",\n "recommendation": "Veredicto final breve de la operaci\xf3n."\n }\n '); return [ 4, askAI(apiKey, secondaryApiKey, prompt, aiModel) ]; case 2: res = _state.sent(); json = extractJSON(res); if (!json || !json.entryZone) throw new Error("La IA no pudo estructurar la respuesta tras analizar los datos. canvas.style.cursor = 'grab'; } } }; var onEnd = function onEnd() { draggedNode = null; }; canvas.onmousedown = onStart; canvas.onmousemove = onMove; canvas.onmouseup = onEnd; canvas.onmouseout = function() { onEnd();
